category_sources: Official QuadcastRGB homepage describes the program as setting RGB lights on HyperX QuadCast S and Duocast microphones.
source_facts.description says it sets RGB lights on HyperX microphones.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is Ors1mer/QuadcastRGB.
docs_sources: Official project homepage includes description, downloads, and mirror links.
Official repository README provides examples, installation, compilation, and FAQ documentation.
repo_sources: Official QuadcastRGB homepage links to GitHub and GitLab mirrors; GitHub repository contains the project README and source.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official README lists CLI operation, Unix-like OS support, and libusb dependency.
Official homepage and README describe controlling HyperX microphone RGB lighting.
